_note: Curated catalogue read by the installer + dashboard Modules tab. Tier is set by maintainers on merge, not by contributors. tiers: core | official | community-vetted | experimental.

modules.name: dashboard
modules.purpose: Localhost read-only status dashboard (service health, modules, projects, memory).

modules.name: argus
modules.purpose: Security overseer: reviews/gates jobs, quarantine, weekly dep scan.

modules.name: data-import
modules.purpose: Import memories from another assistant into your assistant.

modules.name: deck-builder
modules.purpose: Build .pptx decks from a JSON spec (local, python-pptx).

modules.name: vector-kb
modules.purpose: Local semantic memory (vector store) via Ollama embeddings.

modules.name: vault-graph
modules.purpose: Renders memory as a browsable, linked Obsidian vault (graph view).

modules.name: browser-actions
modules.purpose: Interactive browser surface for agents (Playwright; token + allowlist + audit).

modules.name: video-publisher
modules.purpose: PLANNED (not yet implemented): video production + publishing pipeline. Ships no runtime in this release; use media-production + youtube-publishing for shipped video capability.

modules.name: backups
modules.purpose: Daily age-encrypted backup tarball + weekly freshness probe.

modules.name: desktop-launchers
modules.purpose: Desktop .app/.desktop shortcuts for Dashboard / Terminal / Assistant.

modules.name: voice-agent
modules.purpose: Per-tenant TTS/STT task agent (ElevenLabs + Groq Whisper).

modules.name: voice-call
modules.purpose: Real-time voice-call bridge (browser loopback to Gemini Live); conversation-only.

modules.name: Live Stream Vision
modules.summary: Real-time visual awareness: screen share, camera, frame-by-frame analysis via a vision model.

modules.name: Marketing
modules.summary: Outbound marketing channels: LinkedIn, Mailchimp email, Meta. Operator-gated.

modules.name: Website Publish
modules.summary: Publish generated pages/assets to a website over FTP/SFTP.

modules.name: Audio Narrate
modules.summary: Text-to-speech narration via a TTS provider (ElevenLabs by default).

modules.name: YouTube Publishing
modules.summary: Upload videos to YouTube and monitor status via the Data API.

modules.name: Visual Plan
modules.summary: Visual planner: select layout/style preset, dispatch cover/thumbnail/card generation.

modules.name: Writing Toolkit
modules.summary: Long-form writing toolchain: draft, review, assemble multi-section documents.

modules.name: skill-governance
modules.purpose: Skill signing/verification + safety scan + promotion gate (no daemon).
